exploration_notes: Three files in expressjs-express reference the deprecated `req.host` property specifically: (1) lib/request.js defines the deprecated getter at line 454 using `defineGetter(req, 'host', ...)` with a deprecation message; (2) test/req.host.js is the dedicated test file that exercises `req.host` across multiple scenarios; (3) History.md contains changelog entries about `req.host` at lines 799, 1284-1286, 1436, and 2726.
